commit.message:
Fix silence watchdog: don't hang up while AI is talking, ask first

Two fixes:
1. Set activity_event on every AI text/audio delta so the 5s timer
   resets continuously while the AI is speaking (all 3 modes).
2. Before hanging up, ask "Are you still there?" and wait another 5s.
   Only hang up if there's still no response after that.

fix(digitalocean): warn first-time users about required payment method (#2403)

Show a proactive warning before the OAuth/token entry flow when the user
has no saved DigitalOcean config and no DO_API_TOKEN env var. This prevents
new users from completing the full setup flow only to fail at provisioning
because their account has no payment method on file.

Warning is shown only once per first-time setup — returning users (who have
a saved token, even if expired or invalid) skip the reminder.

Closes #2395

commit.message:
fix: CI dependency install順序修正 - bcrypt インポートエラー解消

## 問題
pytest-flask が先にインストールされると最新 Flask (3.1.3) が入り、
後から backend/requirements.txt の Flask==3.0.0 がバージョン競合で
インストール失敗 → bcrypt 未インストール → ModuleNotFoundError

## 修正
- requirements.txt を先にインストール（コアパッケージを固定）
- テストパッケージ（pytest等）を後からインストール
- requirements.txt 一次失敗時の --no-deps フォールバック追加

commit.message:
Fix reserve substitution not triggering for bye teams

When a player's team has no game in a round (bye), teamGameStarted
lookup returns undefined, making gameStarted=false and blocking reserve
subs. Now treats bye teams as "game started" if any game in the round
has begun, allowing Reserve A/B to activate for bye players.

commit.message:
Windows: use NSSM service instead of scheduled tasks for server management

Replace the KukuiBot-Server and KukuiBot-Watchdog scheduled tasks with a
proper Windows service via NSSM (Non-Sucking Service Manager). This provides:
- Auto-start at boot (before user login)
- Auto-restart on crash with configurable delay (5s)
- Proper service management via sc/net start/stop
- Clean process lifecycle tracking

The installer falls back to the legacy scheduled-task approach if NSSM is
unavailable or the install fails (e.g. non-admin session).

Also adds tzdata to requirements.txt to fix ZoneInfo failures on Windows
(Python 3.13 does not bundle timezone data).

Fix: move Clear-Site-Data from API to sw.js only

Having Clear-Site-Data on every API response wiped localStorage on

update check, bypassing the active SW.

commit.message:
Fix ordinal typo handling in address geocoding

Add _fix_ordinal_suffix() to correct malformed ordinal suffixes like
"52rd" -> "52nd", "51th" -> "51st", "43th" -> "43rd" before sending
addresses to the Geosearch API. Previously, "102 e 52rd st" was
being misinterpreted as "102 EAST 72 STREET" (0.91 confidence)
because the malformed ordinal confused the upstream geocoder.

Applied in 3 places:
- _normalize_address(): corrects before API calls
- _normalize_street_for_comparison(): defensive fix for validation
- smart_geocode(): normalizes address before Geosearch step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(semantique): utiliser --keyboard-height pour positionner l'input zone

env(safe-area-inset-bottom) seul ne fonctionne pas avec contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior=.never
(bloque la propagation de additionalSafeAreaInsets vers CSS).

--keyboard-height est déjà setté par ViewController.swift via evaluateJavaScript
avant l'animation clavier → CSS se met à jour immédiatement, sans dépendre de env().

max(var(--keyboard-height, 0px), env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)) :
- Clavier ouvert : --keyboard-height = hauteur clavier → zone collée au clavier
- Clavier fermé : --keyboard-height = 0px → env() = safe area physique
- Android : --keyboard-height non setté → env() = 0 → WebView rétrécit nativement

commit.message:
feat(sdlc): improve fix sweep architecture and add delta audit mode

Phase 3 and Phase 5 now use Opus leads that spawn short-lived Sonnet
workers instead of Sonnet agents owning all fixes. Sonnet agents compact
mid-task when given 15-22 findings; separating planning (Opus) from
execution (Sonnet batches of 2-4 fixes) eliminates that failure mode.

Adds --since=<tag> delta audit mode: scopes all audit agents to changed
files + adjacent callers/callees since the given tag, making continuous
auditing cost-effective without full-repo sweeps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

matching the site's minimal aesthetic.
